docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLINS, JANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIVE KEYS NOTHING.
